description_long: This is a robust, medieval-style helmet featuring a rounded metallic dome with two large, outwardly curving ram horns attached to either side. The helmet is primarily constructed from dark, weathered metal, accented with ornate gold or brass trim running vertically down the center and around the edges. The horns are textured with a natural, ridged pattern and have a grayish tone, adding a dramatic and intimidating appearance. The front of the helmet includes a prominent nose guard, also adorned with decorative metalwork. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or modern retention systems, suggesting a historical or fantasy design. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with leather or padding for comfort.
description: A medieval-style metal helmet with large, curved ram horns and ornate gold trim, featuring a prominent nose guard and weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full faceplate, nose guard, and symmetrical ram horns curving outward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature and texture of the right horn and the helmet's rounded dome.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet and the full span of both horns extending outward.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite side, emphasizing the left horn's shape and the helmet's rear curvature.
attribute_graphic_design: Ornate gold or brass trim with decorative patterns; otherwise plain with no additional graphics.
